requirement_topic.en: PURA and NAWEC Grid Connection — Licensing, Utility Acceptance, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: PURA和NAWEC并网——许可、公共事业接受、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: PURA和NAWEC併網——許可、公用事業接受、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: The Gambia does not appear to publish a single solar-inverter grid code equivalent to some larger markets. The practical gate for grid-tied PV is project-specific review by PURA, which regulates electricity and renewable energy, and NAWEC, the national utility responsible for electricity service. PURA's renewable-energy page states that grid-connected and large-scale solar projects create regulatory challenges and that PURA's role in an early grid-connected renewable project included ensuring grid access, completing a power-purchase agreement, and recommending a licence. For PV inverters, exporters should expect IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, project-specific protection settings, and validation for The Gambia's 50 Hz 230/400 V low-voltage conditions. Where a donor, lender, EPC contractor, or NAWEC specifies a different grid-code profile, that project specification controls.
summary.zh: 冈比亚似乎未公开发布一个类似较大市场的统一太阳能逆变器并网规范。并网光伏的实际门槛通常是PURA和NAWEC的项目级审查：PURA监管电力和可再生能源，NAWEC为负责电力服务的国家公用事业公司。PURA可再生能源页面说明，并网和大型太阳能项目带来新的监管挑战；在早期并网可再生能源项目中，PURA的角色包括确保入网、完成购电协议并建议发放许可证。对于光伏逆变器，出口商应预期需要IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、项目特定保护整定，并针对冈比亚50 Hz 230/400 V低压条件进行验证。若捐助方、贷款方、EPC承包商或NAWEC规定不同的并网配置，则以项目规格为准。
summary.zht: 甘比亞似乎未公開發布一個類似較大市場的統一太陽能逆變器併網規範。併網光伏的實際門檻通常是PURA和NAWEC的項目級審查：PURA監管電力和再生能源，NAWEC為負責電力服務的國家公用事業公司。PURA再生能源頁面說明，併網和大型太陽能項目帶來新的監管挑戰；在早期併網再生能源項目中，PURA的角色包括確保入網、完成購電協議並建議發放許可證。對於光伏逆變器，出口商應預期需要IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、項目特定保護整定，並針對甘比亞50 Hz 230/400 V低壓條件進行驗證。若捐助方、貸款方、EPC承包商或NAWEC規定不同的併網配置，則以項目規格為準。

standards_or_laws: PURA renewable-energy oversight and electricity regulation context
NAWEC project-specific grid-connection and utility acceptance practice
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 / local utility practice — 50 Hz 230/400 V low-voltage settings to be confirmed project by project

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power stations connected to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding results. These documents are based on Chinese utility conditions, including 50 Hz 220/380 V settings under GB/T 156, and do not by themselves establish PURA licensing acceptance or NAWEC grid-connection acceptance in The Gambia.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件基于中国公用电网条件，包括GB/T 156下的50 Hz 220/380 V参数，本身并不能证明已获PURA许可接受或NAWEC在冈比亚的并网接受。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件基於中國公用電網條件，包括GB/T 156下的50 Hz 220/380 V參數，本身並不能證明已獲PURA許可接受或NAWEC在甘比亞的併網接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid documents do not transfer automatically to The Gambia. Prepare a project dossier that includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, inverter protection-setting tables for 50 Hz 230/400 V operation, firmware configuration control, commissioning test procedures, and any NAWEC or PURA forms requested for the project. Treat donor or lender specifications as additional gates for large-scale or concessional-finance projects.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不能自动转用于冈比亚。应准备项目文件包，包括IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、50 Hz 230/400 V运行的逆变器保护整定表、固件配置控制、调试测试程序，以及NAWEC或PURA针对该项目要求的任何表格。大型项目或优惠融资项目还应将捐助方或贷款方规格视为额外门槛。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不能自動轉用於甘比亞。應準備項目文件包，包括IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、50 Hz 230/400 V運行的逆變器保護整定表、韌體配置控制、調試測試程序，以及NAWEC或PURA針對該項目要求的任何表格。大型項目或優惠融資項目還應將捐助方或貸款方規格視為額外門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects through PURA licensing or regulatory review and NAWEC utility connection acceptance; exact evidence list is project-specific and should be confirmed before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese project requirements but is not a substitute for PURA licensing, NAWEC connection acceptance, or donor/lender technical specifications

source.publisher: Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA), The Gambia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat PURA licensing or regulatory review and NAWEC grid-connection acceptance as separate Gambia project gates. Chinese GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62116, IEC 61727, 50 Hz 230/400 V settings validation, commissioning evidence, and any donor or lender requirements before a grid-tied PV inverter is committed to shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将PURA许可或监管审查与NAWEC并网接受视为冈比亚项目的独立门槛。中国GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408证据应补充IEC 62116、IEC 61727、50 Hz 230/400 V参数验证、调试证据以及任何捐助方或贷款方要求后，再将并网光伏逆变器投入出货。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將PURA許可或監管審查與NAWEC併網接受視為甘比亞項目的獨立門檻。中國GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408證據應補充IEC 62116、IEC 61727、50 Hz 230/400 V參數驗證、調試證據以及任何捐助方或貸款方要求後，再將併網光伏逆變器投入出貨。

requirement_topic.en: Off-Grid and Mini-Grid Solar — IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, Donor Procurement, and Humidity/Dust Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 离网和微网太阳能——IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、捐助方采购及高湿/粉尘降额
requirement_topic.zht: 離網和微網太陽能——IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、捐助方採購及高濕/粉塵降額

summary.en: The Gambia has substantial off-grid, mini-grid, and donor-supported solar activity, including regional off-grid programmes. For solar home systems, mini-grids, water-pumping PV, and donor-financed rural electrification, the practical technical baseline may be IEC TS 62257 for rural electrification systems, VeraSol or Lighting Global quality assurance for off-grid products where specified, and project-owner procurement specifications. These routes are not necessarily NAWEC grid-connection approvals, but they can be mandatory procurement gates. Inverter selection should address high humidity, coastal corrosion, dust, enclosure rating, thermal derating, surge protection, maintainability, spare parts, and local installer competence.
summary.zh: 冈比亚存在大量离网、微网和捐助方支持的太阳能活动，包括区域离网项目。对于太阳能家用系统、微网、水泵光伏和捐助方融资的农村电气化，实际技术基线可能包括农村电气化系统IEC TS 62257、在被指定时适用的VeraSol或Lighting Global离网产品质量保证，以及项目业主采购规格。这些路径不一定是NAWEC并网批准，但可能是强制性采购门槛。逆变器选型应考虑高湿、沿海腐蚀、粉尘、外壳防护等级、热降额、浪涌保护、可维护性、备件和当地安装能力。
summary.zht: 甘比亞存在大量離網、微網和捐助方支持的太陽能活動，包括區域離網項目。對於太陽能家用系統、微網、水泵光伏和捐助方融資的農村電氣化，實際技術基線可能包括農村電氣化系統IEC TS 62257、在被指定時適用的VeraSol或Lighting Global離網產品品質保證，以及項目業主採購規格。這些路徑不一定是NAWEC併網批准，但可能是強制性採購門檻。逆變器選型應考慮高濕、沿海腐蝕、粉塵、外殼防護等級、熱降額、浪湧保護、可維護性、備件和當地安裝能力。

standards_or_laws: IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification
VeraSol / Lighting Global quality-assurance requirements where specified by procurement documents
Project-owner, donor, lender, or EPC procurement specifications

summary.en: Chinese off-grid inverter suppliers often provide domestic test reports, GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 documentation for grid-connected models, factory QA certificates, IP-rating claims, and environmental test summaries. These documents may help technical due diligence, but they do not automatically satisfy IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, donor-procurement, or project-owner acceptance requirements for Gambian off-grid or mini-grid deployments.
summary.zh: 中国离网逆变器供应商通常提供国内测试报告、并网型号的GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004文件、工厂质量保证证书、防护等级声明和环境测试摘要。这些文件有助于技术尽调，但不能自动满足冈比亚离网或微网部署的IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、捐助方采购或项目业主接受要求。
summary.zht: 中國離網逆變器供應商通常提供國內測試報告、併網型號的GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004文件、工廠品質保證證書、防護等級聲明和環境測試摘要。這些文件有助於技術盡調，但不能自動滿足甘比亞離網或微網部署的IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、捐助方採購或項目業主接受要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Factory environmental and IP-rating test reports, where available

gap.en: Gap: Domestic China documentation often does not address the exact off-grid procurement profile used in The Gambia. For off-grid or mini-grid supply, map each inverter model to the purchaser's technical specification, IEC TS 62257 clauses where applicable, VeraSol or Lighting Global status where required, tropical-environment derating, surge and lightning protection, battery compatibility, service documentation, and spare-parts commitments.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内文件通常未覆盖冈比亚采用的具体离网采购配置。供应离网或微网项目时，应将每个逆变器型号逐项对应采购方技术规格、适用的IEC TS 62257条款、在需要时的VeraSol或Lighting Global状态、热带环境降额、浪涌和雷电保护、电池兼容性、服务文件和备件承诺。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內文件通常未覆蓋甘比亞採用的具體離網採購配置。供應離網或微網項目時，應將每個逆變器型號逐項對應採購方技術規格、適用的IEC TS 62257條款、在需要時的VeraSol或Lighting Global狀態、熱帶環境降額、浪湧和雷電保護、電池相容性、服務文件和備件承諾。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory when included in donor, lender, PURA, government, EPC, or purchaser specifications for off-grid or mini-grid solar
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese factory and domestic standard evidence may support due diligence but is not automatically accepted for Gambia off-grid procurement

source.publisher: Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA), The Gambia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Gambian off-grid or mini-grid projects, do not assume a China domestic inverter certificate is enough. Check the purchaser's IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, donor, lender, humidity, dust, surge-protection, and service-support requirements before shipment, especially for rural electrification and water-pumping PV projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于冈比亚离网或微网项目，不应假定中国国内逆变器证书已经足够。出货前请核查采购方关于IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、捐助方、贷款方、高湿、粉尘、浪涌保护和服务支持的要求，尤其是农村电气化和水泵光伏项目。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於甘比亞離網或微網項目，不應假定中國國內逆變器證書已經足夠。出貨前請核查採購方關於IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、捐助方、貸款方、高濕、粉塵、浪湧保護和服務支持的要求，尤其是農村電氣化和水泵光伏項目。
